data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B4D9:
I'm the owner of the SEASHORE HOUSE.
But you can call me MR. SEA!\pWhat I love above all is to see hot
POKéMON battles.\pLet me see that your heart burns hot!\pIf you can defeat all the TRAINERS
here, I'll reward your efforts.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B5B9: Show me some hot matches!\pI run this SEASHORE HOUSE just for\nthat reason alone!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B609: You're scorching hot!\nThose battles blazed!\lI'm more than just satisfied!\pAs thanks for showing me your hot\nstreak, I want you to take these.\pIt's half a dozen bottles of SODA POP!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B6BE: Oh, but hey, your BAG's jammed full.\nI'll hang on to these for you.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B702: Want to buy some SODA POP?\nPOKéMON love it!\pJust ¥300 a bottle!\nBuy some!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.UnknownString_819B787: SODA POP! The POKéMON favorite!\nJust ¥300 a bottle! Want one?
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.UnknownString_819B7D2: Oh, dear!\nYou don't have enough money.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B809: If you're looking for a battle on the\nhigh seas, you'll find no hotter \lTRAINER than me, matey!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B869: That was a hot battle!\nI can accept that loss, matey!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B89F: Whenever I'm in SLATEPORT, I enjoy\nhot battles and ice-cold SODA POP!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B8E5: Boring battles aren't worth the effort.\pFiery hot battles are what toughen up\nTRAINERS and POKéMON!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B955: Whew, I'm all thirsty.\nMaybe I'll have a SODA POP.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B988: I'm going to show you how great my\nPOKéMON are, but don't cry!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B9E5: If one of my POKéMON knew the move\nfor carrying me across water on its\lback, I could get rid of this inner tube.
